title: Non-commercial/custom-license acceptance policy (COSMIC/OncoKB)
context: COSMIC (Wellcome Sanger Institute) and OncoKB (MSK) are widely used cancer genomics resources but carry non-commercial/custom-restrictive terms: COSMIC is free for non-commercial use with registration but commercial use requires a paid license and redistribution is restricted; OncoKB has an academic/research license with commercial and redistribution restrictions. The default project stance is FLAG → governance decision (not auto-include, not auto-exclude). This policy must be decided and merged before triage-009 runs, so triage applies a fixed, recorded rule rather than ad-hoc judgment. The policy also defines the NON-COMMERCIAL badge and governanceFlags value used in records. Depends on gate-003.
objective: Record a written, dated governance decision for COSMIC and OncoKB (include-with-prominent-NON-COMMERCIAL-flag vs pointer-only), specify the NON-COMMERCIAL badge text and governanceFlags value, and set the default rule for any future NC/custom-license source — so triage-009 applies a fixed policy rather than ad-hoc judgment.
acceptanceCriteria: A written policy document records the governance decision for COSMIC and OncoKB: include-with-prominent-flag vs pointer-only, with rationale and a recorded decision date and decision-maker.

The policy specifies: the NON-COMMERCIAL UI badge text and style; the governanceFlags value (e.g. 'nc-license') applied to any record admitted under this policy; and the accessTier value (NON-COMMERCIAL) used.
The policy specifies the conditions under which a NON-COMMERCIAL source may be admitted (e.g. only if a governance decision reference is attached, per the CI linter rule in ci-linter-014).
The policy states the default for any future NC/custom-license source not yet covered: FLAG → governance decision, never default-include.
The policy must be merged before triage-009 begins so triage applies a fixed rule; the dependency is explicitly recorded in this document.
output: A committed policy document (e.g. policy-nc-034.md) recording the governance decision for COSMIC and OncoKB (include-with-flag vs pointer-only), specifying the NON-COMMERCIAL badge and governanceFlags value, and setting the default for future NC/custom-license sources.
